summary: Completed testing of 3 bug fixes + Security Log feature for 'The Room' learning platform. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). All 15 frontend features verified (100%). Toast auto-dismiss, mobile scroll, and Security Log feature all working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/security-logs returns paginated logs for admin (200)
Backend: GET /api/security-logs supports pagination (limit/skip params)
Backend: GET /api/security-logs supports event_type filter
Backend: GET /api/security-logs/summary returns event type counts
Backend: Security logs require authentication (401 for no token)
Backend: Login success creates 'login_success' security event
Backend: Failed login creates 'login_failed' security event
Backend: Log entries have required fields (id, event_type, description, created_at)
Backend: Summary contains event type counts
Backend: Non-admin users get 403 on security-logs endpoint
Frontend: Toast notifications auto-dismiss after ~3 seconds
Frontend: Security Log page loads at /security-log for admin
Frontend: Security Log shows 3 summary cards (Failed Logins, Registrations, Approvals)
Frontend: Security Log shows filter pills (All, Login, Failed Login, Registration, Approval, Deletion, Reset)
Frontend: Security Log filter pills toggle correctly
Frontend: Security Log shows individual event entries with correct icons
Frontend: Security Log accessible from mobile admin dropdown menu
Frontend: Dashboard page renders correctly with stats cards and Quick Actions
Frontend: Courses page renders correctly with course cards and New button
Frontend: Chat page renders correctly with Community heading and message input
Frontend: Mobile bottom nav visible and content scrollable (pb-36 padding working)
critical_code_review_comments: Security Log API correctly excludes MongoDB _id from responses (security_log.py line 21)
Security events logged for: login_success, login_failed, user_registered, user_approved, user_deleted, password_reset_request
Toaster duration={3000} correctly set in App.js line 293
Layout.jsx pb-36 padding provides adequate clearance for floating mobile nav
Security Log link correctly added to mobile dropdown for admin users (Layout.jsx lines 243-249)
SecurityLog.jsx implements proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security Log feature fully tested. Key verifications: 1) Backend API returns paginated logs with filtering, 2) Summary endpoint returns event counts, 3) Non-admin gets 403, 4) Frontend shows summary cards, filter pills, log entries with icons, 5) Toast auto-dismiss works (3 seconds), 6) Mobile scroll works with pb-36 padding, 7) Security Log accessible from mobile dropdown for admin.

bug_fixes.toast_auto_dismiss: VERIFIED - Toast disappears after ~3 seconds (Toaster duration={3000})
bug_fixes.mobile_scroll: VERIFIED - pb-36 padding provides clearance for floating nav
bug_fixes.daily_recording_fix: NOT TESTED - Requires active Daily.co room (code-level fix)

backend_api.get_logs: VERIFIED - Returns paginated logs with filtering

frontend_page.summary_cards: VERIFIED - Shows Failed Logins, Registrations, Approvals
frontend_page.filter_pills: VERIFIED - All, Login, Failed Login, Registration, Approval, Deletion, Reset
frontend_page.filter_toggle: VERIFIED - Clicking filter updates displayed logs
frontend_page.log_entries: VERIFIED - Shows entries with correct icons and timestamps
frontend_page.mobile_dropdown: VERIFIED - Security Log link in admin dropdown

event_logging.login_failed: VERIFIED - Created on failed login attempt

pages_render.dashboard: VERIFIED - Stats cards, Quick Actions, Community section
pages_render.courses: VERIFIED - Course cards, search, New button
pages_render.chat: VERIFIED - Community heading, Live status, message input
